data.body:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md containing the complete multi-perspective review protocol extracted from plugins/dso/skills/review-protocol/SKILL.md.

The workflow doc should contain all review logic: parameter handling, Stage 1 (mental pre-review), Stage 2 (sub-agent dispatch with parallel reviewer launch), Stage 3 (score aggregation, conflict detection, revision cycles). The content is moved verbatim from SKILL.md — no logic changes.

## TDD Requirement

Write a test that verifies the workflow file exists and contains the key structural elements (Stage 1, Stage 2, Stage 3, pass_threshold, conflict detection).

## Files to modify

- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md (CREATE — extract from SKILL.md)
- tests/hooks/test-review-protocol-workflow.sh (CREATE — verify structural elements)
- .test-index (EDIT — add mapping)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md exists at plugins/dso/docs/workflows/
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Workflow doc contains all 3 stages
  Verify: grep -c "## Stage" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Workflow doc contains conflict detection section
  Verify: grep -q "conflict" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Workflow doc contains revision cycle logic
  Verify: grep -q "revision" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md
